body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
## Summary
This PR creates a new submodule, SurfaceSchemes, which has three components
1. `surface_state.jl` contains the new surface state structs used to store the surface parameterization, which match the SurfaceFluxes interface better than the previous TC surface representation.
2. `surface_schemes.jl` contains the initial surface conditions for all of the EDMF cases, defined using the new surface state structs. 
3. `surface_conditions.jl` contains the methods used to update these surface conditions at each timestep. Surface values are now updated in `set_precomputed_quantities!` instead of  in `additional_tendency`
`p` now contains `sfc_conditions`, a field of the values at the surface, rather than individual variable fields
The types of these have also been changed to proper C/CTVectors
#### New flow:
1. `sfc_state` is created in `default_cache` from one of the initial surface conditions in `surface_schemes.jl` `sfc_conditions` is created in `default_cache > precomputed_quantities` to store the values at the surface
2. `update_surface_conditions!` is called from `set_precomputed_quantities!`, broadcasting `surface_conditions` across the `sfc_conditions` field (NOT `SF.surface_conditions`)
3. `surface_conditions` handles the logic to construct the surface thermo state, then computes and stores the updated surface conditions

#### Large file changes:
`EDMF_functions.jl`: Replaced some calls to helper functions with code. These helper functions were only called once and didn't make sense to keep around. Changed to use the new sfc_conditions and CT3Vectors
`update_aux.jl`: Removed helper functions, changed to use the new sfc_conditions
`TC/types.jl`: Removed all surface structs and old helper functions. Removed some column getter functions. Removed surf_params from State
`sgs_flux_tendencies.jl`: Update function calls to match new APIs
`vector_diffusion_boundary_layer.jl`: Removed the vdbl cache. Changed calculations to use the new sfc_conditions
`utils/surface.jl`: Deleted
`src/utills/types.jl`: Removed the Coupling and SurfaceScheme types, changed AtmosModel to have a surface_updater field instead of a coupling field.

title: Unify surface parametrization of dycore and EDMF
